summary: Comprehensive testing of Eventa V1 (event discovery, no-auth) — backend pytest suite 22/22 passing including AI summarize + AI recommendations; frontend Playwright covered hero search, category & city filters, sort/filters/clear, save event + saved badge, theme toggle, event detail (hero, schedule, speakers, related), AI summary generation, register/calendar buttons, AI Picks interest chips and grid. All critical user flows verified end-to-end.
action_items: Minor: documented city-card testid is `city-card-{name}` (e.g. `city-card-Mumbai`) but implementation slugifies to lowercase/dash (e.g. `city-card-mumbai`, `city-card-new-delhi`). Either update docs or restore CamelCase in component. Not a functional bug — clicks work, only naming convention mismatch.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); prefer lifespan context manager for FastAPI 0.95+.
list_events `industries` query param overwrites `category` filter when both provided — last-write-wins. Intentional? Worth a guard.
summarize_event returns 502 if AI fails — there is no graceful local fallback (unlike recommendations). Consider providing first 2 sentences of description as fallback so UI never breaks.
ai_summary cached forever in DB without invalidation; if event description changes, the stale summary stays. Acceptable for V1.
Recommendation endpoint accepts `limit` from client without upper bound — add max cap (e.g. 20) to avoid abuse.
Frontend Sonner Toaster theme='system' — works but on toggle it may not follow app theme since app uses custom ThemeContext, not prefers-color-scheme. Minor polish.

Hero counters: total_events from /api/stats includes only seeded 24 — counter labelled 'Events This Week' uses count where start_iso <= now+7days which currently shows 8 for far-future seeded dates (some dates are within 7 days from today). Verified working.
seed_data_creation: 24 events seeded automatically on backend startup via build_events(); covers all 8 cities and 15+ categories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_eventa_api.py uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix. AI endpoints (summarize, recommendations) verified working via emergentintegrations gpt-4o-mini. data-testid `city-card-*` is lowercased+dash (e.g. city-card-mumbai, city-card-new-delhi). AIRecommendations component lives on Home page (bottom), not EventDetail. Event ids evt-001 .. evt-024.
